description: The full-pass behavioral promotion: Tier 1 PASS, Tier 2 GREEN, and the behavioral tier actually ran and passed (Tier 3 GREEN). The final verdict is VERIFIED — strictly stronger than PASS, asserting the skill's behavior was evaluated and correct.
why: § 6 R6 iff t1=PASS AND t2 ∈ {GREEN,YELLOW} AND t3=GREEN. Row (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, GREEN) -> VERIFIED.
